assertions.title: Macro Thesis graph node and surface exist

steps.action: Open the root graph workspace at http://127.0.0.1:3100.
steps.expected: A visible Macro Thesis node is present in the graph shell.
steps.observed: The default workspace rendered a visible 'Macro Thesis' graph button alongside the other graph nodes.

steps.action: Click the Macro Thesis node from the default state.
steps.expected: The app opens a Macro Thesis detail surface focused on the prediction-market investment case.
steps.observed: The URL changed to #graph-macro-thesis and the focused surface rendered 'MACRO THESIS' with the subtitle 'Why war, broken hedges, and prediction-market accuracy matter now'.

evidence.network: GET / -> 200 plus static assets only; no API failures observed during node selection.

assertions.title: Geopolitical risk and portfolio failure data

steps.action: Inspect the Macro Thesis surface copy after opening #graph-macro-thesis.
steps.expected: The surface includes the required geopolitical shock and portfolio-failure claims/figures.
steps.observed: Visible copy included 'US/Israeli strikes hit Iranian military and nuclear targets', '~20% of global oil supply sat exposed at the Strait of Hormuz', and '60/40 diversification cracked'.

steps.action: Verify the market-structure figures on the same surface.
steps.expected: The surface includes BTC drawdown/correlation and memecoin-fraud figures.
steps.observed: Visible copy included BTC '31.5%' crash, BTC/S&P correlation '0.55', memecoin market-cap '61%' collapse, and rug-farming rate '82.8%'.

evidence.network: No additional network/API activity was required beyond the already-loaded page assets.

steps.action: Inspect the prediction-market section of the Macro Thesis surface.
steps.expected: The surface shows the required superiority metrics and market-size figures.
steps.observed: Visible copy listed Brier score '0.0565', one-month accuracy '91.2%', final-hours accuracy '97%', volume growth '130x', '$13B/month' volume, and '$140.63B' cumulative volume.

evidence.network: No API requests involved; static page content only.

steps.action: Review the attribution and evidence cues rendered in the Macro Thesis surface.
steps.expected: Claims are attributed to @tradebetterapp with visible evidence hooks/cues.
steps.observed: The surface visibly rendered '@tradebetterapp Macro Thesis' plus claim-level cues '@tradebetterapp — A World at War' and '@tradebetterapp — The world is shifting beneath your feet', giving users clear attribution targets.

evidence.network: Static content only; no attribution lookup failures observed.

assertions.title: Investor pitch path references macro thesis

steps.action: From the default graph workspace, click 'Investor Pitch Path'.
steps.expected: The guided investor path opens from the graph workspace.
steps.observed: The flow opened on 'What is BETTER' with the investor-path chrome visible.

steps.action: Inspect the path controls before advancing to the wedge.
steps.expected: Macro-thesis content is included or linked before the product wedge step.
steps.observed: On the investor-path surface, a visible 'Macro Thesis' button appeared before the 'Wedge →' control, and clicking it opened #graph-macro-thesis.

evidence.network: No additional API calls; investor-path traversal used client-side hash navigation only.

summary: Tested 5 assertions for the Macro Thesis content-depth flow: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. The graph exposed the Macro Thesis node, the surface rendered the required @tradebetterapp-attributed figures, and the investor path linked Macro Thesis before the wedge step.
